title: Yabya b. 'Abdallah al-'Alawi's Altercation with Bakker b. 'Abdallah al-Zubayri
description: Yabya b. 'Abdallah al-'Alawi's Altercation with Bakker b. 'Abdallah al-Zubayri. Recorded under the year 175 AH (791–792 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 30.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 30
